summary: Completed testing of Profit Calculator feature (iteration 4). All 46 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed. New feature fully functional: /api/upload/orders (matched=63, unmatched=3, profit=157.30€), /api/calculate-manual-profit, /profit page with upload zone, summary cards, results table with price mismatch warnings, manual entry section.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - not affecting functionality, cosmetic console warning from visual editor wrapper

seed_data_creation: Orders file /app/artifacts/orders_sample.xls contains 76 items across 63 matched products + 3 unmatched
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests extended with TestProfitCalculatorUploadOrders (5 tests) and TestProfitCalculatorManualEntry (5 tests). Valid test EANs: 5200040107010 (Natural Doctor D3 K2), 4260006585079 (Viogenesis K2 D3). Price mismatch detection works for abs(my_price - skroutz_price) > 0.02. Beauty of Joseon product has price mismatch (13.20€ vs 11.00€).

features_verified.POST /api/upload/orders: Parses .xls orders file, returns matched=63, unmatched=3, total_profit=157.30€
features_verified.POST /api/calculate-manual-profit: Calculates profit from EAN+quantity array, returns matched status per item
features_verified.Frontend /profit route: Loads correctly with upload zone and manual entry section
features_verified.Summary cards: Shows Πωλήσεις (76), Έσοδα (1852.13€), Κέρδος (+157.30€), Μη αντιστοιχ. (3)
features_verified.Price mismatch indicator: Red text + warning icon when Excel price != stored price (e.g., 11.00€ with ⚠ icon)
features_verified.Manual entry: Add EAN + quantity, click Υπολογισμός, see results with total profit
features_verified.Navigation button: 'Υπολογισμός Κέρδους' button on Calculator page links to /profit
features_verified.Cancelled orders excluded: Orders with Ακυρωμένη/Επιστροφή status are filtered out
features_verified.Unmatched warning: Yellow warning shows '3 προϊόντα δεν αντιστοιχήθηκαν' with product names
